title: About
text: Hi I am Lucas! Welcome to my blog about intersting sports things, mostly biased to my favorite teams.

title: Nebraska had a program first in March Madness
text:
Code
library(tidyverse)


Nebraska’s March Madness run was one for the ages. The Husker’s secured their first March Madness win in program history over Troy. They came into the tournament being the only power 4 team to have never won a tournament game


Code
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = disp, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point()
